Meaning.Vi: lệch chuẩn, bất thường (về hành vi, tính cách)
Meaning.En: deviating from what is normal, usual, or expected, especially in behavior or character
Meaning.Example: His deviant behavior raised concerns among his teachers and peers.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả hành vi vượt ra ngoài chuẩn mực xã hội, thường gây lo ngại.
Situation.En: Describing behavior that falls outside accepted social norms and often causes concern.

Meaning.Vi: người lệch chuẩn, người có hành vi bất thường
Meaning.En: a person whose behavior or character deviates significantly from what is considered normal or acceptable in a society
Meaning.Example: The study focused on understanding deviants in high-stress professions.

Situation.Vi: Sử dụng trong nghiên cứu xã hội học để chỉ cá nhân vi phạm chuẩn mực.
Situation.En: Used in sociological research to refer to individuals who violate societal norms.
